hero.title: Almep Trading — Your strategic partner in professional solutions
hero.description: Almep Trading specializes in supply and distribution of high-quality technical and electrical solutions for business.

about.title: Almep Trading
about.intro_1: Almep Trading: More than a supplier — your strategic partner. In modern business, project success depends on supply chain reliability. At Almep Trading, we go beyond ordinary sales.
about.intro_2: In modern business, project success depends on supply chain reliability. At Almep Trading, we go beyond ordinary sales.
about.feature_quality_text: We ensure 100% product control through laboratory testing and international ISO certification.
about.feature_optimization_text: We don't just sell products — we select the best technical solutions for your budget and timeline.
about.partners_intro: We trust only the best, which is why our portfolio features global leaders:
about.partner_berent: Berent and Harden — the standard of professional hand tools for the most complex tasks.
about.partner_ekf: EKF — advanced electrical solutions for safe and efficient energy systems.
about.partner_sensh: Sensh — innovative components for industrial automation and production.
about.conclusion: Almep means quality assurance, deadline compliance, and an individual approach to every technical specification.

features.professional_text: A reliable partner in high-quality solutions for construction and industrial sectors.
features.solutions_text: We don't just sell products, we offer optimal solutions tailored to project requirements and technical specifications.
features.integrated_text: A flexible management system that simultaneously meets the needs of both large B2B projects and the retail market (B2C).

items.title: 1 Year Official Warranty
items.description: We provide an official 1-year warranty on all our products and completed work.

items.title: Technical Consultation
items.description: Engineering consultation on proper material selection and technical issues at the design stage.

items.title: Installation and Commissioning
items.description: Professional equipment installation with subsequent inspection and commissioning.

items.title: After-Sales Service
items.description: Comprehensive after-sales service: technical support, maintenance and component replacement.

mission.mission_text: To provide the Azerbaijani market with durable, safe and professional construction products
mission.goals_text: To become your long-term strategic partner, providing comprehensive supply and expert support at every stage.

blog.title: Blog
blog.post_title: Almep Trading — The support point of your project
blog.post_text: Behind every successful project are the right partners. We, Almep Trading, don't just supply professional tools for construction and production — we become part of your success. With Berent, Harden, Sensh and EKF brands, we make your projects faster, more reliable and more efficient...

items.text: The best place to buy tools in Baku. Almep Trading always has quality Harden and Sensh brands in stock. Fast delivery and professional approach. Thank you for cooperation!
items.author: Javid Askerov

items.text: I have been using Harden and Berent tools for a long time. Very strong steel, ergonomic handles and high wear resistance. For professional work — this is the best choice for price-quality ratio.
items.author: Ali Agayev

items.text: We purchased a batch of Sensh hand tools. Excellent quality, the tool doesn't bend or break under high loads. Now work is faster and better quality.
items.author: Jeyhun Kerimov

items.text: Excellent service and wide range. We ordered EKF equipment for our facility — everything arrived on time, packed reliably. We will continue working!
items.author: Elshan Mamedov

items.text: Professional team that knows their product. Helped select the right tools for specific tasks. Very satisfied with quality and price.
items.author: Rashad Huseyinov

items.text: We have been working with Almep Trading for several years. Reliable supplier, always fulfill obligations. I recommend to all construction companies.
items.author: Samir Aliyev

items.text: Bought Berent tools for home workshop. Quality exceeded expectations — everything works as it should. Reasonable prices, fast delivery.
items.author: Farid Ismayilov
